creator: astralblue@usa.net
text:
Sorry for the self-reply, but please disregard this PR; I just found a
duplicate entry in PR database (and it had the correct fix).

Thanks,
Eugene

On Thu, 28 Jan 1999, Eugene M. Kim wrote:

| 
| >Number:         9761
| >Category:       ports
| >Synopsis:       Incorrect template directory in bsd.port.subdir.mk
| >Confidential:   no
| >Severity:       serious
| >Priority:       high
| >Responsible:    freebsd-ports
| >State:          open
| >Quarter:        
| >Keywords:       
| >Date-Required:
| >Class:          sw-bug
| >Submitter-Id:   current-users
| >Arrival-Date:   Thu Jan 28 12:50:00 PST 1999
| >Closed-Date:
| >Last-Modified:
| >Originator:     Eugene M. Kim
| >Release:        FreeBSD 4.0-CURRENT i386
| >Organization:
| N/A
| >Environment:
| 
| FreeBSD asiale.ia.cp 4.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 4.0-CURRENT #3: Tue Jan 26 01:46:57 PST 1999     root@asiale.ia.cp:/usr/src/sys/compile/ASIALE  i386
| 
| >Description:
| 
| Revision 1.27 of ports/Mk/bsd.port.subdir.mk has an (apparently) old
| TEMPLATE setting, which causes port READMEs not properly built on
| release makes.
| 
| >How-To-Repeat:
| 
| cd /usr/ports
| make readmes
| 
| >Fix:
| 	
| Apply the following patch from /usr:
| 
| begin 644 xxx
| M*BHJ('!O<G1S+TUK+V)S9"YP;W)T+G-U8F1I<BYM:PE&<FD@1&5C(#$Q(#(S
| M.C,Y.C,P(#$Y.3@*+2TM('!O<G1S+TUK+V)S9"YP;W)T+G-U8F1I<BYM:RYN
| M97<)5&AU($IA;B`R."`Q,CHT,#HR,"`Q.3DY"BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*@HJ
| M*BH@,30T+#$U,"`J*BHJ"B`@+F5L<V4*("!03U)44T1)4B`_/2`O=7-R+W!O
| M<G1S"B`@+F5N9&EF"B$@5$5-4$Q!5$53(#\]("1[4$]25%-$25)]+W1E;7!L
| M871E<PH@("YI9B!D969I;F5D*%!/4E135$]0*0H@(%)%041-13T))'M414U0
| M3$%415-]+U)%041-12YT;W`*("`N96QS90HM+2T@,30T+#$U,"`M+2TM"B`@
| M+F5L<V4*("!03U)44T1)4B`_/2`O=7-R+W!O<G1S"B`@+F5N9&EF"B$@5$5-
| M4$Q!5$53(#\]("1[4$]25%-$25)]+U1E;7!L871E<PH@("YI9B!D969I;F5D
| M*%!/4E135$]0*0H@(%)%041-13T))'M414U03$%415-]+U)%041-12YT;W`*
| (("`N96QS90I0
| `
| end
|
